sections.title: TRKI Certificate / Certificado TRKI
sections.content:
CERTIFICADO TRKI / TRKI CERTIFICATE

El TORKI (Test of Russian as a Foreign Language) certifica tu nivel
de ruso, equivalente al MCER.

NIVELES / LEVELS:
- TORKI-I = B1 (mínimo para grado / minimum for bachelor's degree)
- TORKI-II = B2 (máster / master’s degree)
- TORKI-III = C1

Preparación / Preparation: curso preparatorio de KubGU (3-6 meses).
Preparatory Faculty of KubSU.
Costo del examen / Exam cost: aproximadamente 3000-6000 rubles.
